productDisplayName: Clarks Women Silvi Spice Raspberry Leather Red Flats
description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Silvi Spice leather sandals from clarks. The leather straps gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look. Upper Leather thong straps for durability and comfort Leather strap across the forefoot below the thong straps for added style Midsole Lushly padded leather lined footbed with a perforated design below the thong straps for absolute comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with paisley engraved design on the forefoot and the heel for greater grip Heel for ergonomic comfort shoe care Use a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shining Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
